purpose_string: Test a distinct deterministic seed and lower guide strength after two prompt variants preserved semantic identities but converged to paired-leg motion.

predecessor_experiment_object.result_string: semantic identities remained visible in 49 of 49 frames, but gait QA rejected 20 simultaneous two-hoof swing frames

positive_prompt_string: Locked static camera. Animate the exact supplied low-poly horse as one slow natural four-beat walk cycle in place. Preserve the individual, geometry, colours, proportions, background, ground, framing, hoof shape, and rigid bone lengths. The four colour-coded legs are four separate persistent identities. Use the natural evenly spaced footfall order yellow near hind, cyan near fore, magenta far hind, blue far fore, then repeat. Each hoof lifts, swings forward, and lands at its own distinct beat; no diagonal pair and no same-side pair may lift, swing, or land together. Keep at least three hooves visibly planted during each deliberate single-hoof swing. Stance hooves remain flat and pixel-stable without sliding. Bend only at anatomical joints. Use subtle counter-motion in the pelvis, spine, neck, and head, with no net translation. Frame 0 and frame 48 are the same moving pass-through pose with continuous velocity and no pause, reversal, duplicated beat, or snap.
negative_prompt_string: trot, pace, pacing gait, diagonal pair, lateral pair, paired leg motion, two hooves swinging together, simultaneous hoof lift, simultaneous hoof landing, hopping, gallop, suspension phase, camera movement, pan, tilt, orbit, dolly, zoom, tracking shot, handheld shake, reframing, crop, scene cut, background drift, parallax, identity change, species change, altered proportions, extra limb, missing limb, fused limb, duplicated subject, broken joint, dislocated joint, rubber leg, telescoping limb, changing segment length, curled distal limb, hooked distal limb, curled hoof, hooked hoof, hoof morphing, stretched hoof, toe elongation, toe drag, floating hoof, foot sliding, hoof skating, ground penetration, topology change, material change, colour swap, limb colour swap, flicker, motion smear, endpoint freeze, pause at seam, duplicated endpoint beat, motion reversal, text, watermark, logo
fixed_factors_array: same pinned local RTX 4090 worker and workflow fingerprint
one recorded deterministic seed and one submission only
manual_acceptance_gates_array: all four colour identities persist through every frame
four single-hoof swing beats occur in the prescribed order
no paired gait, distal curl, hoof morph, segment-length drift, or skating
loop seam is continuous without a pause or paired beat

generation_authorization_object.required_next_action_string: Runtime authorization must exactly match this immutable experiment id.
